notes: Schema attribution study. Measures whether schema-only degradation is driven by parse failures, schema/argument errors, or later verifier failures on the shared 12-task toy dataset.

metadata.purpose: Attribute schema sensitivity failures across parse, execution, and verifier stages
metadata.dataset: toy_tasks.jsonl (12 Python tasks across bugfix, lint_format, type_fix, and small_feature)
metadata.modes_tested: base vs description_only vs schema_only vs name_description_schema
